title: Next-day readiness forecasting code and reproducibility materials in elite women's football
description: Reproducible analysis code, manuscript source, figures, tables, and documentation for a secondary analysis of publicly available SoccerMon subjective-monitoring data. Version 1.1.2 replaces the manuscript Figure 1 artwork with a content-rich methodological pipeline that documents calendar-day target alignment, source-team-only model development, comparator-specific population predictions, model-specific past-only residual personalisation, temporal and two-team transportability evaluation, and incremental-value assessment. It does not introduce new numerical analysis or change audited primary and wellness-item-missingness sensitivity estimates. The original SoccerMon dataset is not redistributed.
